subject: Add gradient orb background effect to app shell
description: The design reference has `app-shell__orb--left` and `app-shell__orb--right` - two large radial gradient blobs (emerald/teal tinted) positioned fixed behind content. Creates a subtle organic feel vs our flat #F9FAFB background. Add via CSS pseudo-elements or fixed-position divs in App.jsx. Should be subtle (opacity ~0.15) and not affect performance.
